prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (v6 step 21 — dual-state composition with LEFT: hand lowering blood-filled vial into white protector tube body, ARROW, RIGHT: hand placing black cap onto assembled tube) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in EVERY structural element — same dual-state composition, same hand poses, same vial appearance (transparent tube + red blood + plain ribbed cap), same tube proportions, same arrow, same line-art style on pure white background, same line weight.

>>> THE TEXT ON THE PROTECTOR TUBE IS STILL WRONG — FLIP IT 180° <<<

The TEXT on the cap and body in the v6 reference reads BACKWARDS top-down. It currently spells the words REVERSED.

MODEL THE CORRECT TEXT ORIENTATION FROM THE SECOND REFERENCE IMAGE (the approved step 17 — hand lowering protector tube into the DH-branded bag). In step 17, the text on the tube is rendered CORRECTLY: 'DIALED' on the black cap with the first D at the top, 'HEALTH' on the white body with the first H at the top, both reading forward top-down. Use that step 17's tube text appearance as the EXACT model for how the tube text should appear in step 21.

REQUIRED FINAL STATE for step 21:

  • BLACK CAP (top section in the RIGHT panel, held by the hand): the embossed text 'DIALED' rendered IDENTICALLY to how DIALED appears on the cap in the step 17 reference (SECOND ref) — vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP outlined capital letters running along the cap's axis, with the FIRST D at the very TOP of the cap and the LAST D at the bottom of the cap. Reading top-down: D, I, A, L, E, D = 'DIALED' forward. Thin white outline strokes against the solid-black cap (line-art embossed look). Letters NOT upside-down, NOT mirrored.

  • WHITE BODY (bottom section in BOTH panels): the embossed text 'HEALTH' rendered IDENTICALLY to how HEALTH appears on the body in the step 17 reference (SECOND ref) — vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP outlined capital letters running along the body's axis, with the FIRST H at the TOP of the body and the LAST H at the bottom of the body. Reading top-down: H, E, A, L, T, H = 'HEALTH' forward. Thin black outline strokes against the white body (line-art embossed look). Letters NOT upside-down, NOT mirrored. The body shows ONLY 'HEALTH' (no duplicate 'DIALED' on the body).

  • Combined reading top-down on the assembled tube (RIGHT panel): DIALED forward (cap) → HEALTH forward (body) = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down.

IF the text in your output does not match the orientation of the text in the step 17 reference (SECOND image), the output is REJECTED. The step 17 reference shows the exact target orientation — replicate it.

Do NOT modify anything else — same dual-state composition, same hands, same vial, same blood, same ribbed vial cap, same tube proportions, same arrow, same line weight, same white background, same line-art aesthetic. The ONLY change is the text orientation on the tube to match the step 17 reference exactly.

No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers.
